purpose: Define the persistent, repo-stored project memory layer that records project identity, direction, preservation policy, and extension profile references before DevView can safely generalize project-specific graph vocabulary.

projectIdentity.description: Stable project/repo identity, relevant roots, graph source references, and observed confidence level.

devviewMode.description: The project mode that determines which profile schema and extension vocabulary candidates are relevant.

projectDirection.description: Current project direction and candidate direction vocabulary, such as product growth for native projects or legacy-preserving retrofit for legacy projects.
projectDirection.authorityRule: Direction is advisory until reviewed and accepted as a future project memory revision.

preservationPolicy.description: Behavior, compatibility, hardware, interop, UI, and evidence preservation rules that must bias future traversal and contract generation only after approval.

improvementPolicy.description: Allowed improvement themes, forbidden drift, and evidence required before behavior-changing improvements can be considered.

sourceAuthorityPolicy.description: Which sources are authoritative, observed-only, candidate-only, or forbidden to mutate.

taxonomyProfileRef.description: Reference to the base taxonomy profile and project extension vocabulary proposal boundary.
taxonomyProfileRef.authorityRule: Unapproved extension kinds are not traversal or contract authority.

viewTreeProfileRef.description: Reference to viewpoint tree profile candidates used to explain project-specific graph perspectives.
viewTreeProfileRef.authorityRule: Unapproved view trees are presentation/planning candidates only.

revisionPolicy.description: How direction changes, taxonomy deltas, and view tree deltas must be recorded as proposals and human review packets before a future approved revision exists.

nonAuthorityBoundary.description: Explicit statement that project memory previews do not mutate graph-source, approve extension vocabulary, trigger traversal, or generate contracts.

extensionGapDetector.description: Compare Project Memory required extension vocabulary against current graph-source/read-model vocabulary and report missing, extra, or deprecated kinds without applying changes.

projectMemoryRevisionApply.description: Future-only apply path after explicit human decision records and approved project memory revision state.

nonAuthorityBoundary: DevView Project Memory previews are persistent planning artifacts only. They may guide future proposal and review work, but they do not approve taxonomy extensions, mutate graph-source, change traversal behavior, generate selected slices or contracts, apply graph deltas, satisfy Evidence, prove equivalence, enforce scope, configure CI, or replace human review.
